message.description: The concise final response to send to the user.

attachments.description: Absolute local paths of files that should be sent to the user.

provenance.description: Use web only with the direct source URL, generated only when created during this turn, local for a pre-existing local file, and unknown when the origin cannot be evidenced.

source_url.description: Required for web provenance; otherwise null.

session_disposition.description: Whether the native provider session must remain available for the immediate next request.

memory_refs.description: Changed core/profile.md or core/preferences.md path, or an empty list when no direct user memory was needed.
